title: Regional Infrastructure Operations Manager, Datacenter Operations, Data Center InfraOps
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


The Regional Infrastructure Operations Manager is responsible for one or more Amazon Datacenter Clusters and PoP-scale deployments within a particular region. It is the senior Infrastructure Operations role within the region and has managerial responsibility for safety, security, availability, scaling, efficiency and cost. The Regional Infrastructure Operations organizations are composed of three functions: compute operations, engineering operations and logistics. A physical security organization, while not reporting directly to the Regional Infrastructure Operations Leader, is an integral part of the operation. Compute operations focuses on the server-level platforms that support both Amazon Retail and Amazon Web Services. Engineering Operations focuses on the mechanical, electrical and controls systems that support our data center critical environments. Logistics Operations executes materials planning and control to support both on-going operations and expansions. Security Operations are charged with the physical security of our people, assets, and customer data. The Regional Infrastructure Operations Leader must be able to build and lead high performing teams across each of these functions, understand and manage their day to day operations while at the same time having the technical capability and curiosity to dive deep into any given challenges as needed.  

The Regional Infrastructure Operations Manager is a key role in the management team that is operating and scaling the world’s largest cloud computing infrastructure. We encounter interesting, challenging and complex problems every day. As a technical manager in Amazon you can innovate to solve these issues and help drive operations excellence in all areas of your role. You will have the ability to refine and develop processes to optimize operational excellence in every aspect of your role. You must also have a passion for technology along with a desire to achieve best-in-the-world operational performance.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

* Hiring, managing and developing the operations team including compute operations managers, engineering operations managers, logistics operations managers and their teams
* Attainment of organizational performance goals and objectives relating to safety, security, availability, scaling, efficiency and cost
* Planning and executing the Infrastructure Operations component of new datacentre and Colocation (Colo) expansions
* Operation and maintenance of mechanical, electrical, and controls systems for Amazon datacentres to include preventive maintenance, corrective maintenance and change management
* Vendor management of Colo datacenter services providers to meet or exceed contracted performance SLA’s
* Safety, security, and availability incident response, incident management and incident resolution
* Continuous improvement of operational processes, procedures, methods and tools

  

About the team  

Diverse Experiences  

AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.  

  

Why AWS?  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.  

  

Work/Life Balance  

We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.  

  

Inclusive Team Culture  

Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences.
  

  

Mentorship & Career Growth  

We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Bachelor's degree or above in Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Construction Management or an equivalent engineering science
* Experience in management of datacenter operations, facility engineering operations, information technology critical environment facilities, advanced high volume manufacturing, datacenter build-outs and scaling, or similar fields
* Experience directly managing, mentoring, leading, and coaching construction management and/or engineering professionals
* Experience leading large teams, with demonstrable ability to hire, develop, and manage high-performing technical teams
* Fluency in English to communicate effectively with global teams.
* Driving license valid in EU.

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience in lean or six sigma methodologies for operational, process, and performance improvement projects including process mapping and process re-design
* Experience leading and managing operations of critical facilities which require in-depth knowledge in electrical, mechanical, and control systems
* Knowledge of information technology infrastructure domains such as compute server platforms, storage server platforms, server components, network devices, technologies and architectures, IT service delivery principles and best practices
* Fluency in Swedish.

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.

title: Regional Infrastructure Operations Manager, Datacenter Operations, Data Center InfraOps
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


The Regional Infrastructure Operations Manager is responsible for one or more Amazon Datacenter Clusters and PoP-scale deployments within a particular region. It is the senior Infrastructure Operations role within the region and has managerial responsibility for safety, security, availability, scaling, efficiency and cost. The Regional Infrastructure Operations organizations are composed of three functions: compute operations, engineering operations and logistics. A physical security organization, while not reporting directly to the Regional Infrastructure Operations Leader, is an integral part of the operation. Compute operations focuses on the server-level platforms that support both Amazon Retail and Amazon Web Services. Engineering Operations focuses on the mechanical, electrical and controls systems that support our data center critical environments. Logistics Operations executes materials planning and control to support both on-going operations and expansions. Security Operations are charged with the physical security of our people, assets, and customer data. The Regional Infrastructure Operations Leader must be able to build and lead high performing teams across each of these functions, understand and manage their day to day operations while at the same time having the technical capability and curiosity to dive deep into any given challenges as needed.  

The Regional Infrastructure Operations Manager is a key role in the management team that is operating and scaling the world’s largest cloud computing infrastructure. We encounter interesting, challenging and complex problems every day. As a technical manager in Amazon you can innovate to solve these issues and help drive operations excellence in all areas of your role. You will have the ability to refine and develop processes to optimize operational excellence in every aspect of your role. You must also have a passion for technology along with a desire to achieve best-in-the-world operational performance.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

* Hiring, managing and developing the operations team including compute operations managers, engineering operations managers, logistics operations managers and their teams
* Attainment of organizational performance goals and objectives relating to safety, security, availability, scaling, efficiency and cost
* Planning and executing the Infrastructure Operations component of new datacentre and Colocation (Colo) expansions
* Operation and maintenance of mechanical, electrical, and controls systems for Amazon datacentres to include preventive maintenance, corrective maintenance and change management
* Vendor management of Colo datacenter services providers to meet or exceed contracted performance SLA’s
* Safety, security, and availability incident response, incident management and incident resolution
* Continuous improvement of operational processes, procedures, methods and tools

  

About the team  

Diverse Experiences  

AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.  

  

Why AWS?  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.  

  

Work/Life Balance  

We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.  

  

Inclusive Team Culture  

Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences.
  

  

Mentorship & Career Growth  

We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Bachelor's degree or above in Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Construction Management or an equivalent engineering science
* Experience in management of datacenter operations, facility engineering operations, information technology critical environment facilities, advanced high volume manufacturing, datacenter build-outs and scaling, or similar fields
* Experience directly managing, mentoring, leading, and coaching construction management and/or engineering professionals
* Experience leading large teams, with demonstrable ability to hire, develop, and manage high-performing technical teams
* Fluency in English to communicate effectively with global teams.
* Driving license valid in EU.

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience in lean or six sigma methodologies for operational, process, and performance improvement projects including process mapping and process re-design
* Experience leading and managing operations of critical facilities which require in-depth knowledge in electrical, mechanical, and control systems
* Knowledge of information technology infrastructure domains such as compute server platforms, storage server platforms, server components, network devices, technologies and architectures, IT service delivery principles and best practices
* Fluency in Swedish.

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Systems Engineer
description:
**Systems Engineer**

**Systems Engineer**

Join Fortinet, a cybersecurity pioneer with over two decades of excellence, as we continue to shape the future of cybersecurity and redefine the intersection of networking and security. At Fortinet, our mission is to safeguard people, devices, and data everywhere. We are currently seeking a dynamic System Engineer, to contribute to the success of our rapidly growing business.


.  



**With us you will**

* Lead all technical aspects of a sales cycle with the Enterprise customers, from the initial RFIs, through to RFPs & RFQs when required. This includes the project management and active participation in POCs in partnership with the relevant teams both internally and within the customer and/or commercial partner.
* Have the ability to listen and to understand the technical requirements of the customer, reading between the lines to build a solution which outperforms the competitor offering.
* Be the primary technical point of contact for the customer(s) and partners in close collaboration with your sales partner.
* Continuously strive to improve knowledge around the Fortinet products and solutions, along with maintaining a deep understanding of the competitive landscape and Fortinet’s ability to provide long lasting protection against the ever-evolving threats.
* Have a strong ability to position Fortinet solutions to the customer, whether this be remotely or in person. This requires strong communication skills and the ability to confidently present through whiteboarding, technical white papers, technical plans or customer discussions.
* Manage your time effectively when working on multiple deals simultaneously, ensuring a positive customer experience is maintained.
Maintain accurate activity, contact, and account technical information of all customers and prospects in our CRM (Salesforce).  
* 

**Apply if you**

* Have a high aptitude for security technology, specifically encryption, authentication, with further knowledge of network security, intrusion detection, anti-virus, routing, switching, LAN and WAN being desirable. The CISSP accreditation would also be beneficial.
* Are currently or have previously worked in a pre-sales engineer role, managing end to end technical aspects of deals, through to technical closure.
* Can demonstrate your problem solving skills and how this has impacted key wins within your current organisation.
* Understand and can demonstrate your ability to build and maintain customer relationships, including your ability to effectively communicate technically to a range of both external and internal stakeholders.
Have a strong understanding one or multiple solutions e.g SD-WAN, ZTNA, IAM, Firewall, Switching and Wireless, SecOps, Cloud Security etc.  
* 

**Why Join Us:**

At Fortinet, we embrace diversity and inclusivity. We encourage applications from diverse backgrounds and identities. Explore our welcoming work environment designed for a rewarding career journey with an attractive Total Rewards package to support you with your overall health and financial well-being . Join us in bringing solutions that make a meaningful and lasting impact to our 660,000+ customers around the globe.  



**What you can expect from us**

* Excellent training and development opportunities, providing you with all the tools you need to be successful.
* An open working environment, sharing knowledge and information collaboratively and transparently, with respect to everyone’s thoughts and opinions.
* The opportunity to be part of an innovative, collaborative and winning team.
A competitive salary and incentive compensation package, including stock awards, health and welfare benefits.  
* 

From the start, the Fortinet vision has been to deliver broad, truly integrated, high-performance security across the IT infrastructure. Today, we secure the largest enterprises, service providers and government organizations around the world.  



Fortinet empowers its customers with intelligent, seamless protection across the expanding attack surface and the power to take on ever-increasing performance requirements of the borderless network – today and into the future. We have proven to be a truly innovative technology driven network security company with over 619 registered Global Patents. This is over 3 times more than our closest most innovative competitor!  



#LI-Remote
company_description: Mission: Dedicated to Delivering Security Without Compromise

title: Sales Executive
description:
**About Us****nShift** is the leading global provider of cloud delivery management solutions (SaaS), we enable the frictionless shipment and return of almost one billion shipments across 190 countries each year. We are headquartered in London and Oslo and have over 500 employees across offices in Sweden, Finland, Norway, Denmark, the United Kingdom, Poland, the Netherlands, Belgium, and Romania.
Our software is used by many of the world leading e-commerce, retail, manufacturing, and 3PL shippers due to us having over 1000 carriers integrated into our platform, nearly 3 times more than our competitors!
If you buy goods online, there is a strong chance that nShift has powered that delivery, so come and join us as we shape the future of shipping, one frictionless journey at a time.**About you**
To be successful in this role, you should have previous experience in meeting quotas towards the SaaS-Software product market. You will use your communication skills to cultivate strong relationships with customers, from the identified opportunity until you hand over to the account executives. If you are motivated and results-driven, and enjoy working in a team environment, we’d like to meet you.**Purpose of Role**
Exciting and career-advancing opportunity for a technically savvy, customer-centric, and solution-focused sales professional to join an expanding international team!
We’re passionate about making shipping easy, through creating a community of connected customers, partners and carriers on a single platform, and are looking for a great sales professional to help us fulfil our vision and mission.**Overall responsibility**
Our Sales Managers focus solely on creating new revenue by selling to new customers and extending the usage of nShift products to our current customer base. You will work in close cooperation with Business Development Representatives and Global Account Managers to find new opportunities and have the support of technical Pre-Sales, Professional Services and others in closing them.**The area of responsibility includes:**
Own the full sales cycle from first contact through to signed contract - discovery, demo, proposal, negotiation, and close.
Together with pre-sales, verify the customer's technical requirements
Identify client needs and suggest appropriate products/services from the nShift portfolio* Build a strong personal network across logistics, e-commerce, and retail sectors in the Nordics.

Use Apollo and other sales intelligence tools to research accounts, identify key contacts, and execute targeted outbound sequences
Hit and exceed monthly and quarterly new logo and revenue targets
Proactively identify and target mid-market companies across the Nordics that are a strong fit for nShift's delivery management platform
Negotiate and close deals with mid-segment & enterprise-sized companies within the manufacturing-industrial sector and towards the logistics industry (3PL & 4PL)
Attend relevant industry events and trade shows to generate leads and raise nShift's profile in the market
Stay up-to-date with new products/ services and new pricing/payment plans
Report to the Head of Sales (weekly/monthly/quarterly) results & improvement ideas
Consistently generate a pipeline that is 3-4x your quarterly target, maintaining volume and quality at all times
Manage multiple opportunities simultaneously with a disciplined, CRM-first approach to pipeline hygiene and forecasting
**Requirements:**
Proven commercial and business acumen, skills to develop business through outbound and inbound opportunities.
3+ years of B2B SaaS or technology sales experience in a new business or outbound role
Experience selling into logistics, e-commerce, retail, or supply chain is a strong advantage
Experience in presenting to, negotiating with and closing at C-level.
Strong relationship management and networking abilities on different organizational levels
Ability to organize, prioritize and execute various activities and focus areas to maximize growth.
Ability to accurately forecast revenue based on current business opportunities
Hands-on experience with outbound sales tools, particularly Apollo or similar platforms (e.g. Outreach, Salesloft, ZoomInfo)
Comfortable with high-volume cold calling - you see the phone as your greatest asset, not a last resort
Flexible mindset and can-do attitude: Willingness to adapt to customer and organizational needs.
Track record of achieving and over-achieving your own quota
Experience with CRM software (e.g. Salesforce)
Experience from using the MEDDPICC, SPIN or similar methodology.
Understanding of sales performance metrics
Excellent communication and negotiation skills
Ability to deliver engaging presentations
Fluency in **Swedish or Danish** is required.
Proficiency in a second Nordic language (Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, or Finnish) is an advantage.
**Please ensure you upload your CV in English**
At nShift we believe in embracing diversity in all forms and fostering an inclusive environment for everyone, which we believe is essential for our continued success. We're an equal-opportunity employer, which means that all applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, family or parental status, national origin, veteran, neurodiversity, or disability status.

title: Specialistsäljare till Atea Software Cloud & Services
description:
**Möjliga placeringsorter för rollen:** Borlänge, Gävle, Luleå, Skellefteå, Sundsvall, Umeå, Örnsköldsvik och Östersund.

  



Har du erfarenhet av att driva affärer och hjälpa större kunder inom molnlösningar, programvaror och tjänster? Vill du arbeta i en dynamisk miljö där du får möjlighet att utveckla försäljningsstrategier för framtidens moln- och tjänstelösningar? Atea Software Cloud & Services söker nu en specialistsäljare som vill vara en del av ett engagerat team och bidra till våra kunders framgångar.

  


**Din roll**
------------



I rollen som specialistsäljare kommer du att spela en central roll i att utveckla och genomföra försäljningsstrategier för moln- och tjänstelösningar. Du arbetar nära kunderna för att identifiera deras behov och erbjuda skräddarsydda lösningar som hjälper dem att nå sina affärsmål.  

  

Exempel på dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:


* Utveckla och genomför affärs- och försäljningsstrategier inom molnlösningar, programvaror och tjänsteerbjudanden
* Driva komplexa affärer och identifiera nya affärsmöjligheter med fokus på långsiktighet
* Leda kunddialoger på beslutsfattarnivå (t.ex. CIO, IT-chef och verksamhetsledning)
* Säkerställa hög kundnöjdhet genom nära samarbete med interna team och leveransorganisation
* Ta ägarskap för strategiska kunder och bygga starka, förtroendefulla relationer över tid


Du blir en del av ett team med 10 engagerade kollegor med placering från Borlänge till Luleå. Vi värdesätter ett öppet klimat och arbetar tätt tillsammans för att nå gemensamma mål. Våra kollegor har varierande erfarenhet och kompetenser, men vi delar alla en passion för vårt arbete och ett driv att utvecklas tillsammans.


**Vem är du?**
--------------



Du är kommunikativ, relationsskapande och har ett affärstänk som hjälper dig att identifiera kundbehov och skapa värde.  

  

För tjänsten som specialistsäljare ser vi att du har:


* Erfarenhet av komplex B2B försäljning inom it-branschen, gärna med fokus på programvaror, moln- och tjänstelösningar
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med värdebaserad och konsultativ försäljning
* Stark kommunikations- och förhandlingsförmåga
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt och i team
* Resultatorienterad med en stark drivkraft att nå och överträffa mål
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift

**Om Atea**
-----------



Visste du att Atea är den ledande leverantören av it-infrastruktur i Norden och Baltikum? I Sverige är vi runt 2700 medarbetare fördelade på 35 kontor runt om i hela landet. Vår styrka ligger i vår kombination av lokal närvaro, vårt omfattande och heltäckande erbjudande samt alla våra specialister. Tillsammans med våra kunder och partners bygger vi Sverige med it och förbättra vardagen för skolbarn, lärare, äldre, sjukvård och näringslivet. Hos oss får du vara en del av världens mest hållbara it-servicebolag, där vi är med och påskyndar omställningen mot en mer hållbar it-värld.


På Atea blir du en del av en vardag och en kultur som präglas av framåtanda, laganda och humor. Vi har en vision om att vara "The Place to Be" – en plats där alla växer och trivs, med kollegor som bryr sig om dig, om kunderna och om samhället.


**Kontakt & mer information**
-----------------------------


Med anledning av kommande semesterperiod kommer processen pausas under sommaren och därmed tar återkoppling längre tid än vanligt. Men ansök redan idag då tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum!  

  

Har du frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta Niclas Larsson, Försäljningschef Software i Region Norr via niclas.b.larsson@atea.se.

I den här rekryteringen kan arbetspsykologiska tester användas som en del av urvalsprocessen. Som en kvalitativ del i vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår slutkandidater en bakgrundskontroll för vissa av våra tjänster, detta för att öka kännedomen om dig som vår framtida medarbetare.



Vårt arbetssätt är flexibelt - Vi tror på att ge möjlighet till flexibilitet i vardagen men merparten av arbetstiden som vi inte spenderar hos en kund eller på resande fot utgår vi från kontoret, som är vår primära arbetsplats.



Varmt välkommen med din ansökan till oss!


*Den här rekryteringen hanteras av oss på Atea och vi undanber oss därför samtal och mail från rekryterings- och bemanningsföretag*.

  

**Följ oss i sociala medier**

  

#LI-ONSITE

title: Lead Builder - Next Generation Counter UAS Mission System
description:
*Vill du påverka och göra skillnad på riktigt? Här bidrar du till att skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen. Det du gör spelar roll.*


Din roll


Vi bygger nästa generations C5ISR-plattform för multi-domäna operationer. Som en del av detta utvecklar vi en ny Counter-UAS mission system-förmåga ovanpå plattformen, från sensorintegration och fusion till operatörsflöden, beslutstöd och effektsamordning.


Nu söker vi dig som vill leda framtagandet av mission system (on-keyboard). Det här är inte en traditionell förvaltnings- eller projektledarroll. Vi söker en tekniskt tung lead builder som vill vara med och bygga en ny operativ förmåga från grunden och skapa det team som behövs.


Du blir ansvarig för att leda framtagandet av vår nästa generations Counter-UAS Mission system på vår nya C5ISR-plattform. Rollen innebär att vara djupt involverad i koncept, arkitektur, prioriteringar och implementation tillsammans med plattformsteam och domänspecialister. Rollen är hands-on och kräver både tekniskt djup och förmåga att driva fram riktning och tempo.


Du kommer även att forma och mobilisera den kompetens som krävs för att realisera förmågan, både genom nära samverkan med andra delar av organisationen och genom externa resurser vid behov.


Arbetet sker i en modern, AI-native utvecklingsmiljö med fokus på:

* Distribuerade system
* Realtidsdata och fusion
* Edge / cloud-arkitektur
* Sensor- och effektorintegration
* API- och dataplattformsdriven utveckling
* AI-accelererade utvecklingsflöden


Det här är en möjlighet att vara med och definiera hur framtidens Counter-UAS-förmågor byggs - tekniskt, operativt och organisatoriskt.


Tjänsten är placerad i Solna.


Din profil


Vi tror att du:

* Har erfarenhet av att bygga komplexa mjukvarusystem – inte bara koordinera dem
* Kan ta en idé från whiteboard till fungerande operativ förmåga
* Är bekväm nära kod, arkitektur och tekniska beslut
* Har förståelse för mission system, sensorsystem, taktiska system eller försvarsnära lösningar
* Trivs i miljöer där mycket fortfarande formas och där tempo är viktigt
* Har förmåga att skapa struktur, riktning och teknisk kvalitet i ett nytt område
* Kan leda seniora utvecklare och specialister mot ett gemensamt mål


Vi söker dig som inte bara följer utvecklingen inom agentisk AI, utan ligger i framkant och redan experimenterar - i arbetet, på fritiden eller båda. Du har energi, teknisk nyfikenhet och driv att lära dig snabbt, testa nytt och omsätta moderna verktyg i verklig produktutveckling.


Du trivs i miljöer där förutsättningarna inte är fullt ut satta, där utforskande och innovation är en del av vardagen. Du motiveras av att bygga nya förmågor tillsammans med andra skickliga människor – och av att se idéer bli verklighet.


Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.


Vad du blir en del av


Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.


Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 26,100 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.


Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här.


Vänligen observera att vi arbetar med löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum har gått ut.


Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Technical Product Manager
description:
Location: Malmö  

Department: AI Models & Alarm Intelligence  

Hiring Manager: Christian Falck

**The role**
============


As a Technical Product Manager within AI Models & Alarm Intelligence, you will drive clarity, alignment, and execution across a complex set of AI initiatives with multiple dependencies and stakeholders.


This is a newly created position within the team and an exciting opportunity to shape how product management and delivery coordination are done within one of Verisure's fastest growing technology domains. You will work closely with Machine Learning Engineers, technical experts, stakeholders across Europe, and external partners, helping create transparency, alignment, and momentum across multiple initiatives.


The role combines product ownership, project coordination, stakeholder management, and technical understanding (you need to understand enough to facilitate discussions, manage expectations, identify risks, and help the team deliver successfully).


You will join a collaborative and highly skilled AI team working with technologies such as Computer Vision, Edge AI, Cloud AI, and next-generation detection solutions that impact millions of customers.

**What you will be up to**

* Maintain a clear overview of team priorities, deliveries, risks, dependencies, and stakeholder expectations
* Continuously align with engineers to understand real progress, identify blockers, and ensure dependencies are actively managed.
* Coordinate feedback from countries using our AI-powered products and translate insights into priorities and improvements
* Escalate risks, dependencies, and delivery challenges proactively
* Introduce structure and ways of working in an evolving environment where processes and ownership are not yet fully defined.
* Build strong relationships across the wider R&D organization and help drive collaboration across multiple teams

**Good fit if you have**
------------------------

* Experience as a Technical Product Manager, Product Manager, Product Owner, Project Manager, or similar role
* Strong organizational and planning skills
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication abilities
* Experience working closely with software engineering or technical teams
* Ability to create structure and clarity in fast-moving environments
* Experience balancing multiple priorities and dependencies simultaneously

**Nice to have / technologies and areas we work with**

* AI, Machine Learning, Computer Vision, or Data Products
* IoT products and platforms
* Jira and modern product development tooling
* AWS, Azure, or cloud-based AI environments
* Experience working with external vendors and technology partners
* Product development within hardware and software environments

**Should I apply?**


Strong fit if most of these resonate with you:

* You enjoy creating structure and visibility in complex environments
* You naturally bring people together around common goals
* You are proactive and prefer solving problems before they become blockers
* You are good at coordinating multiple initiatives simultaneously
* You are curious about AI and emerging technologies
* You thrive in collaborative and international environments

**FAQ**
-------

* **Is this a Product Owner role?**  

Partly, but broader. The role combines product ownership, project coordination, stakeholder management, planning, communication, and delivery follow-up across multiple initiatives.
* **Do I need an AI or Machine Learning background?**  

No. AI experience is beneficial but not required. What matters most is your ability to work with technical teams, understand complex products, and create structure around delivery.
* **Will I manage people?**  

No. This is an individual contributor role with significant influence across projects, teams, and stakeholders.
* **What is the biggest challenge in this role?**  

Managing dependencies across multiple teams and stakeholders while maintaining transparency, alignment, and realistic expectations.

**Bottom line**


If you enjoy bringing clarity to complexity, working alongside talented AI engineers, and helping innovative AI-powered products move from idea to reality, this is an opportunity to make a significant impact in one of Verisure's most exciting and rapidly growing technology domains.

**About Verisure**
==================


Verisure is the leading provider of professionally monitored security services in Europe and Latin America. As of 31 December 2025, Verisure provides premium monitored alarm services to a portfolio of ~6.2 million families and small businesses across 18 countries, with a team of more than 30,000 colleagues.


For the year ended 31 December 2025, Verisure delivered a strong financial performance: Total Revenue of €3,745 million, Adjusted EBITDA of €1,708 million (46% margin) and Adjusted EBIT of €953 million (25% margin). This performance builds on the Company’s track record of resilient, uninterrupted growth over the long term and highlights the strength of its recurring revenue model.


Verisure is majority owned by Hellman & Friedman LLC, a leading private equity investment firm.


Beginning October 8th, 2025, Verisure is listed in the Nasdaq Stockholm Stock Exchange. With €3.1 billion raised in primary proceeds, this was the largest IPO in Europe since 2022 and the largest in Sweden in over 25 years.

**My team and I eagerly await your application! Join us on this journey towards a safer, smarter world. Apply today!**


If you have questions regarding this position, please reach out to our Group Senior TA Specialist, Robert Jonasson, at robert.jonasson@verisure.com


Verisure is an equal-opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from diverse backgrounds. We are an international company with offices and colleagues in multiple countries.

**Verisure - 35 years of delivering peace of mind.**
====================================================
company_description: Verisure, a fast growing company full of career opportunities. Verisure Belgium is part of a global organisation active in 14 countries.

title: IAM Analyst - Cybersecurity (Active Directory/EntraID)
description:
**Job Description** **WHAT YOU'LL DO**  

As an IAM Analyst, you will be leading the implementation, management, and monitoring of security measures across software, services, and IAM technology. With advanced knowledge of cybersecurity principles, you will ensure the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of organizational assets. Together with senior stakeholders, including project and product teams, you will ensure that security is integrated into the development and operational processes. As part of a strategic security initiative, you drive the ongoing evolution of security processes, strengthen data protection efforts, and ensure that best practices are implemented across the organization’s technology platforms and services.

*You will*

* Lead the day-to-day work of our Identity Platform team of six engineers, ensuring clarity, prioritization, and smooth delivery.
* Coordinate closely with IAM Operations teams, ensuring a consistent and efficient handover from engineering to implementation.
* Run agile ceremonies including daily stand-ups, backlog refinement, sprint planning, and PI planning.
* Track and follow up on sprint and PI outcomes, create and assign Jira tasks and monitor team workload and capacity.
* Co-create the technical roadmap with the IAM lead to support long-term improvements across authentication, directory architecture, and governance.
* Contribute to key programmes, including cloud home authentication migration to Microsoft Entra ID and the decommissioning of ADFS.
* Support the directory modernization efforts.
* Drive and lead directory hygiene and governance improvements, removing unused objects and identifying architectural gaps.
* Coordinate audit and compliance work including documentation for PCI DSS, ISO 27001, and financial audits.
* Represent the team in cross-functional discussions, translating business needs into technical requirements.

**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH**  

You will belong to our Cyber Security Architecture & Engineering team and be part of Enterprise IAM. The Identity & Access Management (IAM) organization consists of around 65 people across three teams. This role leads the Directory Engineering sub-team of six engineers and works closely with the Operations team (14–15 people).


The team’s scope of responsibility covers aspects from managing the core directory infrastructure, supporting transformation of our journey. We are set up to provide the organization with a single point of contact for any IAM related matter within H&M.

**WHO YOU ARE**

*We are looking for people with*

* 5+ years of experience with Microsoft Active Directory and Microsoft Entra ID
* Knowledge of EntraID Connect or EntraID Connect Sync.
* Experience working in large enterprise environments with complex IAM ecosystems.
* Experience with agile ways of working including backlog management and sprint delivery.
* Effective communication skills, able to translate between business and technical teams.
* Experience in collaborating with or managing external service providers.

*And people who are*

* Positive, collaborative and energizing to work with.
* Curious and forward-looking, open to innovative technologies and new ways of working.
* Comfortable managing multiple priorities in a mid-to-fast-paced environment.
* Structured and organized with a clear ability to bring clarity where needed.
* Confident leading without formal authority and acting as the glue between teams.

**WHO WE ARE**  

H&M Group is a global company with strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.


We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.


**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE**  

At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe.


* All our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program (HIP)
* All our employees receive a staff discount card, which is usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET.
* Work-life balance, 30 days’ vacation, and wellness allowance 4000 SEK/yearly.
* Access to Benify, for discounts on e.g., Gym memberships, travel, hotels and many other great deals.
* Compensation boost during parental leave

**JOIN US**  

Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it is our people who make us who we are.


This is a **full-time permanent position**, starting as soon as possible according to agreement. **The role is a hybrid position, based in our office in Stockholm, Sweden.**


Apply by sending in your CV in English as soon as possible. Due to data policies, we only accept applications through career page.


Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here. We are eager to meet you!

* *We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application.*
company_description: At H&M, we welcome you to be yourself and challenge you to grow and make a difference. Help us reimagine the future of an entire industry, making everyone look, feel & do good.

title: IFS Application Analyst
description:
*Vi tror att framsteg och möjligheter skapas bäst tillsammans. Välkommen till en plats där samarbete gör skillnad.*

  

Som IFS Business Analyst hos Saab blir du en nyckelspelare i utvecklingen av våra affärskritiska system och processer. Du arbetar nära verksamheten för att omsätta behov till hållbara systemlösningar inom IFS Cloud. Rollen ger dig möjlighet att påverka både teknikval och arbetssätt i en komplex och högteknologisk miljö. Här gör ditt arbete skillnad – på riktigt.


Din roll


I rollen som IFS Business Analyst arbetar du nära verksamheten och IT för att säkerställa effektiva och framtidssäkra lösningar inom våra affärssystem. Du blir en del av ett team som ansvarar för förvaltning, vidareutveckling och optimering av IFS Cloud.


Du kommer bland annat att:

* Identifiera, analysera och dokumentera verksamhetsbehov kopplat till Manufacturing inom IFS Applications
* Leda och facilitera dialoger med intressenter för att nå samsyn kring krav, lösningar och prioriteringar
* Delta i utveckling, förbättring och implementering av funktionalitet i IFS Cloud
* Bidra till verksamhetsutveckling genom att föreslå smarta och effektiva lösningar
* Arbeta med felsökning, problemlösning och förbättringsarbete i komplexa systemmiljöer
* Delta i uppdateringar och releaser enligt IFS kadens samt driva införandet av nya funktioner
* Samarbeta tätt med utvecklare, arkitekter och andra applikationsexperter inom ERP Applications


Resor inom Sverige sker cirka en gång i månaden, men globala resor kan också förekomma.


Du tillhör sektionen ERP Applications inom Group IT och arbetar tillsammans med cirka 30 kollegor med olika specialistkompetenser.


Din Profil


Vi söker dig som har ett genuint intresse för affärssystem och verksamhetsutveckling, och som trivs i en roll där du får kombinera analys, kommunikation och teknisk förståelse.


Vi tror att du har:

* Några års erfarenhet av liknande arbetsuppgifter som Business Analyst eller motsvarande
* Goda kunskaper i IFS Applications, särskilt inom Manufacturing
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med verksamhetsutveckling kopplat till affärssystem
* Relevant högskoleutbildning inom systemvetenskap, industriell ekonomi, teknik eller motsvarande
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i komplexa organisationer med många intressenter
* Förmåga att kommunicera tydligt, både muntligt och skriftligt, på svenska och engelska
* En analytisk och lösningsorienterad inställning samt förmåga att utmana och förbättra befintliga arbetssätt

  

Kunskap i IFS ses som starkt meriterande, men erfarenhet från andra affärssystem och verksamhetsområden kan också vara värdefull.


Som person är du driven, engagerad och trivs med att arbeta både självständigt och i team. Du tar ansvar, driver ditt arbete framåt och har ett tydligt fokus på resultat.


Tjänsten är placerad antingen Linköping, Jönköping eller Göteborg.


Vänligen observera att vi arbetar med löpande urval men med anledning av sommarperioden kan återkoppling och process ta något längre tid än vanligt.

*Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.*

  

Vad du blir en del av


Bakom våra innovationer finns alla de som har gjort det möjligt. Modiga pionjärer och kluriga tänkare. Vardagshjältar och kreativa problemlösare. De som delar djup kunskap och de som utforskar nya områden. Och alla däremellan.

  

Här har du chansen att påverka och bidra på ditt unika sätt. Allt från att utveckla kod och bygga imponerande försvars- och säkerhetslösningar till att ta en kaffe med en kollega. Varje bidrag räknas. Vi ger dig möjlighet att anta utmaningar och skapa smarta innovationer. I vår vänliga och tekniksmarta värld finns plats för dig att växa. Vi finns här för att tillsammans skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen.

  

Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 22 000 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.

  

Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här  



Vänligen observera att vi arbetar med löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum har gått ut.

title: Restaurangchef hos O’Learys Karlskoga
description:
**Restaurangchef hos O’Learys Karlskoga**

**Om tjänsten:** Vi söker nu en engagerad och erfaren Restaurangchef som vill ta ledningen för vår verksamhet hos O’Learys **Karlskoga**. Som Restaurangchef är du ansvarig för att säkerställa att vår restaurang fungerar smidigt och levererar enastående service till våra gäster. Din roll innebär att driva verksamheten både administrativt och operativt, samt att vara en förebild för ditt team och en representant för restaurangen utåt. Rollen innefattar arbete vissa helger.

**Om dig**: Vi letar efter dig som värderar likabehandling och respekt gentemot både kollegor och gäster. Din passion för mat, service och att skapa minnesvärda gästupplevelser kommer att vara avgörande för din roll hos oss. Vi söker dig som kommer vara stolt medlem i O'Learys-familjen och som strävar efter att upprätthålla en hög standard och kvalitet i allt du gör, både individuellt och som en del av vårt team.

**I arbetsuppgifterna ingår att**:

* Driva försäljningen mot uppsatta mål och optimera arbetssätt för att nå önskade resultat.
* Leda ett team inom olika områden såsom bar, servering, kök och aktiviteter.
* Skapa en stark teamkultur och atmosfär genom ett bra ledarskap
* Leda personalutbildning och utveckling av medarbetare
* Ansvara för rekrytering, schemaläggning, planering och prognostisering
* Säkerställa löpande underhållsarbete och rapportera till Operations Manager
* Ansvara för att enhetens gemensamma mål följs och leverera en gästupplevelse av högsta kvalitet.

**Önskad erfarenhet och egenskaper:**

* Erfarenhet från restaurangbranschen, önskvärt från O’Learys
* Erfarenhet av ledarskap och personalansvar
* Meriterande med erfarenhet av Caspeco Cloud kassasystem
* Resultatinriktad, lösningsorienterad, flexibel och förmåga att driva arbete självständigt
* Utmärkta kommunikations- och ledarskapsförmågor
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i en snabbt föränderlig miljö

**Låter det här som något för** **dig?**


Tveka inte att söka tjänsten redan idag, intervjuer sker löpande. Vid frågor om tjänsten kontakta **Faroug Mehrabi ( faroug.mehrabi@olearys.se)**.Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!

**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**

* Resultatdrivet bonussystem
* Personlig utveckling
* Möjlig karriärstege
* Kollektivavtal

**Om O’Learys**


O’Learys är mer än bara en restaurang. Det är ett nöjescentrum som utöver kärleken till sport, mat, dryck och god stämning är en mötesplats fylld av aktiviteter och nöjen alla dagar i veckan. Utöver vårt stora aktivitetsutbud med allt för både stora och små, erbjuder vi även live evenemang och konserter med några av Sveriges största DJ’s, band och artister.

*Vi tror på forskningsbaserade och objektiva utvärderingsmetoder som stöd i arbetet att hitta rätt person till rätt roll. Av den anledningen använder vi Alva Labs assessmentmetoder i våra rekryteringsprocesser för att hjälpa oss identifiera kandidater som med störst sannolikhet att trivas och passa i rollen.*

title: Interim förändringsledare SRE till kund i Stockholm
description:
#### **OM JOBBET**


Detta är ett strategiskt uppdrag där du ska etablera en helt ny operativ förmåga inom SRE (Site Reliability Engineering) för en bank i Stockholm. Du kommer att bygga upp ett team om cirka 8 personer med ansvar för 24/7 level 2-drift av moderna, verksamhetskritiska applikationer i containerbaserade miljöer. Uppdraget kräver att du kombinerar teknikförståelse med operativ realism, governance och förändringsledning i en miljö med mycket höga krav på tillgänglighet, säkerhet och compliance.


#### **OM FÖRETAGET**


Du kommer att arbeta som konsult hos en etablerad bank i Stockholm med verksamhetskritiska IT-system och moderna plattformslösningar. Bankmiljön ställer höga krav på säkerhet, spårbarhet, compliance och revisionsbarhet.


#### **ARBETSUPPGIFTER**


Som interim förändringsledare kommer du att driva hela etableringsprocessen från målbild till fungerande operativ leverans. Du kommer att agera som interim teamlead samtidigt som du säkerställer att förmågan etableras på ett långsiktigt hållbart sätt.


Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter inkluderar:


* Ta fram målbild, etableringsplan och genomförandestruktur för den nya SRE-förmågan
* Definiera teamets uppdrag, ansvar, tjänstegränser och samspel med applikationsteam, servicedesk, driftpartner och andra intressenter
* Bygga upp teamet avseende roller, kompetenser, bemanning, onboarding och beredskapsmodell samt agera interim teamlead
* Etablera arbetssätt för incidenthantering, larmhantering, eskalering, runbooks, problem management och operativ uppföljning
* Införa modell för produktionsmognad och onboarding av applikationer till SRE-teamet, inklusive readiness criteria och supportgränser
* Driva utvecklingen av monitorering, dashboards, observability och mätetal, gärna med stöd i LGTM eller motsvarande
* Säkerställa att teamet kan verka operativt i moderna miljöer baserade på OpenShift/Kubernetes, Azure, pipelines och plattformskomponenter
* Bidra till minskad operativ risk genom bättre stabilitet, kortare återställningstider och högre grad av automation
* Säkerställa att förmågan etableras i linje med bankens krav på säkerhet, compliance, accesskontroll och revisionsbarhet


#### **ERFARENHETER OCH EGENSKAPER**


**Krav:**


* Minst 8–10 års erfarenhet i seniora roller inom IT-drift, production operations, plattform, cloud eller SRE
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att etablera, transformera eller leda operativa förmågor/team inom drift, plattform eller SRE
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att arbeta i komplexa verksamhetskritiska IT-miljöer med många beroenden och intressenter
* Erfarenhet av att definiera operating model, ansvarsfördelning, samverkansformer och processer mellan flera funktioner
* God förståelse för containerbaserade plattformar såsom Kubernetes och/eller OpenShift
* God förståelse för cloudmiljöer, gärna Azure, samt plattformsnära områden som nätverk, IAM, secrets, storage och databaser
* God förståelse för CI/CD, pipelines, automation och moderna leveransflöden
* Erfarenhet av incidenthantering, beredskap, larmhantering, problem management och operativ uppföljning
* Erfarenhet av att etablera eller utveckla monitorering, observability, dashboards och mätetal
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i miljöer med höga krav på säkerhet, compliance, dokumentation och revisionsbarhet
* Erfarenhet av förändringsledning och införande i organisationer där nya arbetssätt behöver förankras
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka sig på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


**Personliga egenskaper:**


* Mycket strukturerad och van att etablera ordning i komplexa sammanhang
* Tydlig, trygg och förtroendeskapande i ledande roller
* Pragmatisk och handlingskraftig med förmåga att få saker att hända
* Skicklig på att navigera mellan olika intressenter, mandat och perspektiv
* Förmåga att kombinera strategisk höjd med operativ detaljförståelse


#### **ÖVRIGT**


**Start:** 17 augusti 2026

**Omfattning:** 100%

**Plats:** Stockholm


#### **TID FÖR ANSÖKAN**



Låter detta som något för dig? Skicka in din ansökan redan idag – vi intervjuar löpande!


#### **OM D-SOURCE**


*Your source to IT*  

D-Source är ett modernt konsultbolag med bredden mellan helpdesk, infrastruktur och Tech. Vi har lång erfarenhet av att förstå kunders IT-behov! Tveka inte att höra av dig om du är intresserad av att ta reda på mer.



Vad kan vi göra för dig och vad kan vi göra tillsammans?


#### **INGET JOBB FÖR DIG?**



Lugnt! Du kan alltid registrera dig förutsättningslöst på D-Source jobbsida genom att Connecta med oss. Då hamnar du i vår kandidatdatabas och får koll på våra kommande aktuella tjänster.

title: Commercial Product Manager
description:
* Application Deadline: Aug. 16, 2026
* Kista
* Hybrid
**Job Description**
-------------------

*As Commercial Product Manager, you take end-to-end commercial ownership of your product area. Acting as the business driver behind growth, profitability and market relevance. You define where we play, how we win and how our offerings create measurable value for customers. By combining customer insights, market trends and close internal collaboration, you turn strategy into concrete roadmaps, propositions and scalable business models that strengthen Tele2’s competitive position.*



At Tele2’s B2B unit (Business to Business), we work with a broad portfolio of IT and telecom products and services. We support customers of all sizes – from micro businesses to large enterprises and the public sector – helping them digitalize, secure and develop their business potential.



As friendly experts, we combine deep expertise with a practical, customer-focused approach. Working in B2B means collaborating closely with our customers to create solutions that drive business value, strong customer experiences and sustainable growth.  

  

**About the job**  

The product area focus is to delivers mobile phones, accessories, and other workplace-supporting hardware to meet customer needs and create added value. The team is responsible for developing and maintaining one of Sweden’s most competitive and cost-efficient product portfolios. We set the product strategy, roadmap and priorities all to ensure profitability, customer relevance, and long-term growth.


* P&L ownership: manage profitability, budget, forecasting, and follow-up for your portfolio.
* Product portfolio management: own, develop, and optimize the portfolio to ensure competitiveness and relevance.
* Commercial strategy & roadmap: design and execute the product strategy, ensuring clear priorities and long-term growth.
* Market and technology insight: stay at the forefront of trends to drive innovation in products, business models, and propositions.
* Customer-centric development: lead initiatives aligned with customer needs.
* Business steering: define agreements, business rules, partnerships, and frameworks to secure performance and scalability.
* Collaboration & delivery: work closely with Supply chain, Device, DCT, customer operations and Sales to ensure product delivery.

  

  

**Who are you?**  

To thrive and succeed in this role we believe that you have...


* Strong commercial mindset with P&L ownership and sharp business acumen.
* Ability to turn ideas into successful products and drive innovation.
* Excellent communicator and team player with strong stakeholder management skills.
* Your ability to drive results spans both strategic and hands-on operational activities.
* Fluency in both Swedish and English, both written and spoken, is essential.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office 365 is a must


Preferred Qualifications


* Experience within IT and Telco sectors and familiarity with various product areas is a valued asset, although not mandatory.
* Ability to compile presentations for diverse set of stakeholders and higher management teams


We believe that you are an individual with strong ambition to make a change. You are probably a forward thinker updated on the latest trends and market needs. In addition, you are a team player, business savvy and detailed oriented, all complemented with a drive to change the status quo and improve on past performances. You can present and communicate innovative ideas and complex matters in a way all types of stakeholders understand.  

  

**A few words from the manager**


*My name is Martin Östberg, and I am the manager of Tele2 B2B Business Management & Sales enablement team for Managed IT services including hosting and hybrid cloud services, digital workplace offering as well as handsets and accessories together with our e-commerce offering within B2B.*  

*In my team, we encourage each other to be innovative, proactive and too think outside the box. We are committed to integrating sustainability and customer experience into our business strategies.*  

*I would be thrilled to see you as a new member of our future-oriented team!*


**Great Place to Work**
-----------------------

* Pension and health care
* Hybrid and flexible work life balance
* Career opportunities
* Parental benefit
* Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
* Inclusive workplace
**Skills & Requirements**
-------------------------

**Why Tele2**


* **A culture of natural born challengers** – At Tele2 we don’t just do things the traditional way. We challenge the status quo and push boundaries to create smarter and more valuable solutions for our customers. You will be part of a culture that values curiosity, initiative and collaboration, where new ideas are welcomed and everyone’s contribution matters.
* **Inclusive and supportive environment** – We believe in fostering a creative and flexible workplace where people can bring their whole selves to work. Diversity and inclusion are important to us, and we strive to create an environment where people feel welcome, respected and supported in growing both personally and professionally.
* **A sustainability challenger** – We are proud that Tele2 has been recognised as Europe’s Climate Leader by the Financial Times and named as Sweden’s most sustainable company by Time Magazine and Statista, reflecting our strong commitment to reduce emissions, transparency and long-term climate goals. Our efforts focus on three areas where we can make the biggest difference: advancing a circular economy, combating climate change, and protecting children online. By embedding these focus areas into how we operate and innovate, we aim to create positive impact for people, planet and profit.


**Interest and application**  

Would you like to be a part of the Tele2s value-driven and including culture? Then hit the “apply now” button and let’s find out if we’re a match!


If you have any specific questions regarding the position, please feel free to contact TA specialist: annelie.sjogren@tele2.com



Please note that in compliance with personal data management regulations (GDPR), we are unable to accept CVs via email.


Warmly welcome to submit your application! To ensure an inclusive and fair recruitment process, we focus on your experiences and skills. Therefore, Tele2 has chosen not to consider cover letters. Instead, we kindly ask you to answer the screening questions included in the application form.



As a step in the recruitment process, Tele2 performs a background check on final candidates.

 *Please note that due to the summer holiday season, this application window will remain open longer than usual. We will begin reviewing applications and starting the selection process in August. We appreciate your patience during this summer period and look forward to reading your application.*


**Work with great people**
--------------------------

Emma
Digital Capabilities & Technology
*"Everyone at Tele2 always aim for the stars in order to create unlimited possibilities."*
Fanny
Systemspecialist Unified Communications
*"The work environment at Tele2 supports both personal and professional development, and there are significant opportunities for further career advancement"*
**About the company**
---------------------

At Tele2, we challenge the telecom industry to create more valuable solutions for our customers. Guided by our challenger mindset, we deliver high-quality connectivity and digital services, ranging from mobile and fixed networks to TV, streaming and global IoT.


Sustainability is an integral part of how we work. Tele2 has been recognized as a climate leader in Europe by the Financial Times and named Sweden’s most sustainable company, reflecting our long-term commitment to reducing our environmental impact and advancing circular solutions together with our customers.


Our values – Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficiently – guide our culture, how we collaborate and how we turn ideas into action.
